github.copilot.chat.welcomeMessage.text:
👋 **AI Coding Assistant**

Ready to work!

**Quick Start:**
• Type `/project` or `/begin-project` — starts full project workflow (contract → design → engineering)
• Or say **'begin project'** to load context and start work

**Project Commands:**
• `/project` or `/begin-project` — initiate project lifecycle
• `/save` — save session progress
• `/end` — end session with full summary
• `/status` — preview current status
• `/continue` — resume an existing project
• `/new` — start a new project

**Agents:**
• `@project-manager` — orchestrates the full lifecycle
• `@contract-agent` — defines project scope one question at a time
• `@design-agent` — UI/UX specs before implementation
• `@senior-engineer` — production-ready code
• `@test-agent` — comprehensive test coverage
• `@api-agent` — API endpoint builder
• `@docs-agent` — technical documentation
